mapper.select: SELECT STATION_NO , STATION_NAME , CHARGER_NO , C.STATUS , S.STATUS AS STATION_STATUS FROM CHARGER C JOIN STATION S USING(STATION_NO) ORDER BY STATION_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT STATION_NAME , S.STATUS AS STATION_STATUS FROM CHARGER C JOIN STATION S USING(STATION_NO)
